---
title: "Host intestinal differential gene expression (display)"
subtitle: "04__DiffGeneExp — mirrors `Code/01__Analysis/04__DiffGeneExp.R`"
author: "Michael Sieler"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 6
params:
  rerun_analysis: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = isTRUE(params$rerun_analysis),
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

start <- if (requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE) && !is.null(knitr::current_input())) {
  dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE))
} else {
  getwd()
}
init_rel <- file.path("Code", "00__Setup", "source_project_init.R")
root <- normalizePath(start, mustWork = TRUE)
while (!file.exists(file.path(root, init_rel))) {
  parent <- dirname(root)
  if (identical(parent, root)) {
    stop("Could not find ", init_rel, " above ", start)
  }
  root <- parent
}
source(file.path(root, init_rel))
sieler2026_source_initialize_project(root = root)

# Knit with repo root as working directory so relative paths resolve consistently.
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = root)

bundle_path <- here::here("Results", "04__DiffGeneExp", "Stats", "diffgeneexp__host__bundle.rds")

if (isTRUE(params$rerun_analysis)) {
  source(here::here("Code", "01__Analysis", "04__DiffGeneExp.R"))
}

if (!file.exists(bundle_path)) {
  stop(
    "Bundle not found: ", bundle_path, "\n",
    "Run `Code/01__Analysis/04__DiffGeneExp.R` from the project root, or knit with ",
    "`params$rerun_analysis: true`."
  )
}

deg <- readRDS(bundle_path)

# Resolve paths saved in bundles:
# - Prefer the stored path when it exists on this machine
# - Otherwise, treat it as relative to the repo root (here::here)
resolve_bundle_path <- function(p) {
  if (is.null(p) || !nzchar(p)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  if (file.exists(p)) {
    return(p)
  }
  p2 <- tryCatch(here::here(p), error = function(e) NA_character_)
  if (!is.na(p2) && file.exists(p2)) {
    return(p2)
  }
  p3 <- file.path(root, p)
  if (file.exists(p3)) {
    return(p3)
  }
  p
}

# Include a PNG from the bundle, robust to absolute/relative paths.
# We rely on Pandoc `--embed-resources` (RStudio knit) to create a standalone HTML.
include_png <- function(p) {
  p_res <- resolve_bundle_path(p)
  if (is.null(p_res) || !nzchar(p_res)) {
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  p_abs <- normalizePath(p_res, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  knitr::include_graphics(p_abs, rel_path = FALSE)
}
```

This report loads `Results/04__DiffGeneExp/Stats/diffgeneexp__host__bundle.rds` produced by [`Code/01__Analysis/04__DiffGeneExp.R`](../01__Analysis/04__DiffGeneExp.R).

## Metadata

```{r meta, echo=FALSE}
deg$meta
```

## Significant DEGs by exposure regime

```{r treatment-deg-table, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(deg$table_treatment_deg_counts)) {
  deg$table_treatment_deg_counts
} else {
  gt::gt(deg$tables$treatment_deg_counts)
}
```

```{r treatment-deg-figure, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=5.75}
p <- deg$paths$figures$significant_genes_by_treatment_bar_png
if (!is.null(p)) {
  include_png(p)
} else {
  cat("Treatment DEG bar figure not found:", p)
}

```





## Top-50 DEG heatmap (parasite exposure by prior stressor history)

```{r heatmap-figure, echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
p <- deg$paths$figures$heatmap_top_50_genes_parasite_exposure_png
if (!is.null(p)) {
  include_png(p)
} else {
  cat("Top-50 heatmap figure not found:", p)
}
```

## Additional summaries

```{r history-table, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(deg$table_history_deg_counts)) {
  deg$table_history_deg_counts
} else {
  gt::gt(deg$tables$history_deg_counts)
}
```

```{r parasite-history-table, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(deg$table_parasite_history_deg_counts)) {
  deg$table_parasite_history_deg_counts
} else {
  gt::gt(deg$tables$parasite_history_deg_counts)
}
```

## Output paths

```{r paths, echo=FALSE}
deg$paths
```
